checklist.note: LP-1 resolved: token_re now built as (?<!\w){pattern}(?!\w), giving full \b-equivalence to the old _TOKEN_RE incl Unicode adjacency — independently confirmed 0 mismatches over @/$/?/!/digit AND Unicode (método, foo_é, cafébar x, über_x). Pattern loaded inside scan_doc_refs; cli untouched; defaults preserved; has_decoration provably never True under default ident_re.

Diff confined to the declared files; LP-1 fix touches only doc_refs.py token_re construction + language_profile.py docstring + design §3.3 + the equivalence test; no CLI/event surface change; no drive-by edits.

language_profile.py mirrors source_scope.py's tolerant idiom plus re.compile validation; defaults on every wrong shape; the added trailing (?!\w) carries a comment explaining the Unicode equivalence; consistent naming; no dead code.

Invalid/empty/missing/non-dict/corrupt-YAML all return default without raising; all-decoration candidate rejected by ident_re.match; Unicode-adjacency fixtures (método/foo_é/cafébar/über_x) now assert byte-for-byte equality; Ruby proof still captures valid?, charge!, @balance, total_amount in real def positions. 17 doc_refs tests pass.

doc refs clean; sync --check green; design §3.3 + language_profile docstring updated to (?<!\w){p}(?!\w) with full (incl Unicode) equivalence note; generated cli/state docs regenerate byte-identical; getting-started backticks do not trip the gate.
